purpose: Formalizes whether AI capex creates or destroys economic value added on a per-share basis
components: Legacy capital base (~$500B) at ~25% ROIC generating ~$77.5B EVA
AI invested capital (~$600B cumulative) at 3-12% ROIC
Bull case: AI capital generates $15B EVA (16% of total from 55% of capital)
current_assessment: Even in the bull case, AI capital is value-dilutive on a per-share basis. Revenue growth may mask the dilution in absolute terms but not in return-on-capital terms.
limitations: AI-specific ROIC is nearly unmeasurable when bundled into existing products
Revenue attribution between AI and legacy products is arbitrary
Specific magnitudes are illustrative, not precise (direction at 6/10, magnitudes at 4/10)
Does not capture option value of AI investment or strategic positioning benefits
